label: Pawn kind life stage
description: Per-life-stage configuration for a pawn kind, including graphic overrides for each body state and optional butcher drop.

label.label: Label
label.description: Life stage label shown in UI, such as 'kitten' or 'calf'. Overrides the parent race life stage label for this pawn kind.

labelPlural.label: Label (plural)
labelPlural.description: Plural form of the life stage label.

labelMalePlural.label: Label (male plural)
labelMalePlural.description: Male-specific plural life stage label override.

labelFemalePlural.label: Label (female plural)
labelFemalePlural.description: Female-specific plural life stage label override.

bodyGraphicData.label: Body graphic data
bodyGraphicData.description: Primary body graphic used for this life stage.

femaleGraphicData.label: Female body graphic data
femaleGraphicData.description: Body graphic override for female pawns at this life stage.

dessicatedBodyGraphicData.label: Dessicated body graphic data
dessicatedBodyGraphicData.description: Graphic used for the desiccated corpse state at this life stage.

femaleDessicatedBodyGraphicData.label: Female dessicated body graphic data
femaleDessicatedBodyGraphicData.description: Desiccated corpse graphic override for female pawns at this life stage.

corpseGraphicData.label: Corpse graphic data
corpseGraphicData.description: Graphic used for the fresh corpse state at this life stage.

femaleCorpseGraphicData.label: Female corpse graphic data
femaleCorpseGraphicData.description: Fresh corpse graphic override for female pawns at this life stage.

silhouetteGraphicData.label: Silhouette graphic data
silhouetteGraphicData.description: Graphic used when rendering the pawn as a silhouette.

swimmingGraphicData.label: Swimming graphic data
swimmingGraphicData.description: Graphic override used when the pawn is swimming at this life stage.

femaleSwimmingGraphicData.label: Female swimming graphic data
femaleSwimmingGraphicData.description: Swimming graphic override for female pawns at this life stage.

rottingGraphicData.label: Rotting graphic data
rottingGraphicData.description: Graphic override used for the rotting corpse state at this life stage.

femaleRottingGraphicData.label: Female rotting graphic data
femaleRottingGraphicData.description: Rotting corpse graphic override for female pawns at this life stage.

stationaryGraphicData.label: Stationary graphic data
stationaryGraphicData.description: Graphic override used when the pawn is stationary at this life stage.

femaleStationaryGraphicData.label: Female stationary graphic data
femaleStationaryGraphicData.description: Stationary graphic override for female pawns at this life stage.

flyingAnimationEast.label: Flying animation (east)
flyingAnimationEast.description: AnimationDef used when the pawn is flying and facing east at this life stage.

flyingAnimationNorth.label: Flying animation (north)
flyingAnimationNorth.description: AnimationDef used when the pawn is flying and facing north at this life stage.

flyingAnimationSouth.label: Flying animation (south)
flyingAnimationSouth.description: AnimationDef used when the pawn is flying and facing south at this life stage.

flyingAnimationEastFemale.label: Flying animation (east, female)
flyingAnimationEastFemale.description: AnimationDef used for female pawns flying east at this life stage.

flyingAnimationNorthFemale.label: Flying animation (north, female)
flyingAnimationNorthFemale.description: AnimationDef used for female pawns flying north at this life stage.

flyingAnimationSouthFemale.label: Flying animation (south, female)
flyingAnimationSouthFemale.description: AnimationDef used for female pawns flying south at this life stage.

butcherBodyPart.label: Butcher body part
butcherBodyPart.description: Body part dropped when this pawn kind is butchered at this life stage.
